# @pondoknusa/collection

Fluent, typed collection pipeline for Pondoknusa

## Install

```bash
npm install @pondoknusa/collection
```

| Field | Value |

| Version | `2.0.0` |
| Source | [`packages/collection`](https://github.com/pondoknusa/pondoknusa/tree/main/packages/collection) |

## Public exports

From the package entry point (`dist/index.d.ts`). Deep imports are not supported.

### Values

- `Collection`
- `collect`

### Types
